user_query: I want to check the availability of the domain name example.com. Can you perform a WHOIS lookup for this domain and provide the availability status? Also, fetch the WHOIS data for the domain example.org using the Bulk WHOIS API.

TaskList.description: Perform a WHOIS lookup for the domain example.com to check its availability status.
Fetch the WHOIS data for the domain example.org using the Bulk WHOIS API.
